project.name: Silk
project.summary: Silk is a TypeScript package monorepo for zero-runtime CSS-in-TypeScript, framework integrations, build plugins, presets, examples, docs, SWC/Rust plugin work, and npm package release.
goals: Provide type-safe styling with build-time CSS extraction and zero runtime cost.
Own the Silk package family, public exports, framework integrations, build plugins, presets, docs, examples, and release proof.
Keep product-specific design systems and app styles outside core packages.
nonGoals: Own consuming applications' visual identity, product UI, routing, auth, persistence, or deployment.
Encode a customer-specific design system into Silk core.
Publish package changes without CI/release proof and npm registry readback.

owns.name: silk-package-ecosystem
owns.description: Core styling packages, build plugins, framework bindings, presets, examples, docs, and SWC/Rust plugin artifacts.

owns.name: silk-package-release
owns.description: CI and release workflow evidence for the public Silk npm package family.

doesNotOwn: Consuming applications' product UI, design tokens, routing, auth, persistence, deployment, or customer-specific styling rules.
External framework internals beyond documented adapter contracts.

publicSurfaces.name: Silk README, docs, package docs, and examples
Test, SWC plugin, and release workflows

forbiddenCouplings: Do not put product-specific design-system decisions into Silk core.
Do not couple framework bindings except through documented shared package surfaces.
Do not publish package changes without workflow-owned proof and npm registry readback.

delivery.deployPath: Pull requests run .github/workflows/test.yml; SWC plugin paths also run .github/workflows/swc-plugin-test.yml; main pushes run .github/workflows/release.yml via SylphxAI/.github.
delivery.productionProof: Test workflow pass, SWC plugin workflow pass when applicable, release workflow completion for package changes, and npm registry readback for changed packages.

packageRelease.releaseIntent: Silk publishes public npm packages from the monorepo through the central reusable release workflow.
packageRelease.versionPr: Version/changelog ownership is delegated to the central reusable release workflow at adoption time.
packageRelease.publisher: .github/workflows/release.yml via SylphxAI/.github reusable release workflow with inherited repository secrets.
packageRelease.publishProof: npm registry readback for every changed @sylphx/silk package.

gaps.description: CI uses repo-local legacy Test/SWC workflows rather than ADR-29 stable fan-in contexts.
